steps.title: Use the concession pattern
steps.content: The final sentence begins with Still, which signals a return to the idea that Modernista design shows natural influences. The blank should introduce the concession that the staircase and tilework are not literally natural objects.

steps.title: Reject additive transitions
steps.content: A adds another supporting point, B signals similarity, and D signals a result. None of those prepares for the Still pivot in the next sentence. The needed transition acknowledges an obvious limitation before the passage reaffirms natural influence. The answer is C.
